## 📋 PR Checklist

> Fill this out before requesting review. Incomplete PRs may be closed without review.

### Type of Change
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🔥 Hotfix (branched from `prod`)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 📦 Dependency update
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Config / CI/CD change

---

### Service(s) Affected
- [ ] `api-dotnet` (C# API)
- [ ] `worker-java` (Java Worker)
- [ ] `shared` (shared schemas)
- [ ] Infrastructure / Docker / CI

---

### Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Be concise but complete. -->



### Related Issue / Ticket
<!-- Link to GitHub issue or Jira ticket -->
Closes #

---

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Manually tested locally (describe how below)

**How was this tested?**
<!-- e.g., ran `dotnet test`, started docker-compose, hit endpoint X -->



---

### Breaking Changes
- [ ] This PR introduces breaking changes

If yes, describe the impact and migration steps:
<!-- e.g., API contract change, DB schema migration required, env var renamed -->



---

### Security
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are hardcoded
- [ ] No sensitive data is logged
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed for known vulnerabilities

---

### Reviewer Notes
<!-- Anything the reviewer should pay extra attention to? -->
